title: 2025-03-02--mcp-config-sync (PRD: docs/prd/2025-03-02--mcp-config-sync.md)
description: Epic: MCP Configuration Synchronization from Codex to Droid CLI. Sync 10 MCP servers from Codex config.toml to Droid's mcp.json.

title: Setup Environment and Verify Prerequisites
description: Check required tools (Python, npx, uvx), verify source config exists and is readable, check target directory permissions. DoD: Python environment has TOML parsing capability; Source file ~/.codex/config.toml exists and is readable; Target directory ~/.factory/ is writable; No sync-blocking issues found.

title: Parse Codex TOML Configuration
description: Read ~/.codex/config.toml, extract MCP server sections (mcp_servers.*), validate TOML syntax, filter out claude-code server as per PRD requirement. DoD: Successfully read TOML file; Identified and extracted 10 MCP server definitions (excluding claude-code); TOML syntax validated (no parsing errors); claude-code server filtered out; MCP server definitions stored in structured format; API keys preserved (firecrawl, github).

title: Create Timestamped Backup of Droid Config
description: Generate timestamp in YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS format, copy existing ~/.factory/mcp.json to backup file ~/.factory/mcp.json.backup-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS. If file doesn't exist, note this and continue. DoD: Timestamp generated; Existing mcp.json backed up successfully or noted as non-existent; Backup file created at correct location; Backup file permissions preserved; Backup file verified readable.

title: Generate Droid JSON Configuration
description: Convert TOML MCP sections to JSON format with Droid schema. Critical conversion: Codex bearer_token_env_var must be converted to Droid headers.Authorization with Bearer prefix. Map fields: command, args, url, env sub-section. Add explicit 'type' field for each server (stdio or http). DoD: TOML to JSON conversion complete; All 10 MCP servers correctly mapped; JSON schema valid and properly formatted; No data loss during conversion; Environment variables preserved in JSON structure; GitHub bearer_token_env_var converted to headers.Authorization.

title: Write and Validate New Configuration
description: Write generated JSON to ~/.factory/mcp.json. Validate JSON is parseable before write. Ensure file permissions preserved. DoD: Original mcp.json backed up before write (if existed); New JSON written to ~/.factory/mcp.json; File permissions preserved (chmod 600 for security); JSON file valid (parsable without errors); File contains all 10 expected MCP servers.

title: Validate MCP Discovery in Droid
description: Test that Droid can discover all synced MCP servers. Run droid exec --list-tools or verify through Claude Code ToolSearch. Test basic functionality for each MCP type. DoD: Droid CLI can start with new configuration; All 10 MCP servers discoverable via tool listing; ToolSearch returns all expected MCPs; HTTP servers (deepwiki, github, clickup, exa, excalidraw) respond to queries; Command servers (context7, playwright, chrome-devtools, firecrawl, serena) commands are accessible; No MCP server conflicts or errors reported.

title: Manual QA Smoke Tests
description: Execute smoke test plan from Discovery: Happy-path tests (all 10 MCPs discoverable and functional), Unhappy-path tests (invalid configs fail gracefully, missing env vars don't crash), Regression tests (existing configurations unchanged). Document pass/fail results. DoD: Happy-path tests passed (MCP discovery, NPM MCP functionality, HTTP MCP functionality, Python MCP functionality, env var propagation); Unhappy-path tests passed (invalid config detection, missing validation, JSON malformation); Regression tests passed (Codex config unchanged, Claude Code session preserved, MCP tool selection works); Test results documented.
